creator: efonnes@gmail.com
text: Using the card as an 802.11n access point, clients connecting in 802.11n mode cannot attain higher than 802.11g transfer speeds.  I don't know a lot about 802.11n, but if ampdu is required for 802.11n rates, it may be related to the ampdu issue on mwl, because I need to disable it to even reach 802.11g rates.
